text:
Egypt’s volleyball team is gearing up for a crucial match against Brazil in their third encounter at the 2024 Paris Olympics.

Egypt’s volleyball team enters today’s match as the final group stage game against Brazil, aiming for their first victory after losing their first two matches. As the match approaches, Egyptian fans are eagerly searching for the channel broadcasting the match and the exact timing to support their team.

Egypt’s volleyball team is placed in Group B at the 2024 Paris Olympics, alongside Brazil, Italy, and Poland.

Egypt’s volleyball team had a disappointing start to the tournament, suffering a 3-0 defeat to Poland on the first day. They followed this up with another 3-0 loss against Italy.

The match will be played on Friday, August 2nd at 2 pm Cairo time. It will be aired on beIN Sports 5.

The Egyptian national volleyball team roster consists of 13 players: 12 starters and one reserve. These players are:Hossam Youssef, Mostafa Jaber, Reda Hekal, Seif El-Din Hassan, Abd El-Rahman Hussein, Mohamed Adel, Mohamed Othman, Mohamed Mostafa, Mohamed Gamal, Abd El-Rahman Al-Husseiny, Ahmed Azab, Mohamed Reda, and Ahmed Diaa, the reserve.

The Paris Olympic Games are scheduled to continue until August 11 in the French capital.
title: When and where to watch Egypt volleyball team match vs Brazil in Paris Olympics - Egypt Independent
author: Al-Masry Al-Youm
